search_queries.profile_likelihood: HIGH — care providers maintain active LinkedIn for CQC compliance visibility, staff recruitment, and sector credibility. Full name known. Good probability of active profile.
search_queries.upgrade_priority: HIGH — if Linda has posted about care quality, CQC inspection results, staff recognition, or community volunteering in the last 60 days: flag first 200 chars of post text in linkedin_profiles.json for BRAIN to upgrade note from generic to post_reference

search_queries.note: Full name Linda Walsh known. Care sector LinkedIn profiles tend to be professionally maintained — CQC registration, staff welfare posts, client testimonials. If active within 60 days: send connection note immediately and populate linkedin_profiles.json. If profile found but no activity in 60+ days: skip and let tomorrow's breakup email close the sequence.
